creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Trying to following instructions and options in rc.conf(5) on how to configure and utilise the automount facility, I found - nothing!

Nothing on autofs, automount, automountd and autounmountd so far, as the keywords are already in etc/defaults/rc.conf.

It is also confusing having "autofs" and "automount" - one wants to restart the automount facility has to issue

service automount restart 

to ensure both the daemons of automountd and autounmountd have restarted in order - based upon "autofs_enable" I would consider 

service autofs restart

which isn't.
